title: CI and integration hardening
description:
Post-merge CI on main: build release runtime bridge before AOT e2e, wire ASan bridge archive and serialize runtime tests, ffi_v03 and compiler submodule bumps, formatter MDX CI, Runtime CI on compiler pointer changes, corelib-quality submodule fix, and trudoc verify via Node.
